ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., General, Primary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election for easier filtering and reporting */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., Upcoming, Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for voter registration */,
  "early_voting_start" TEXT /* Start date for early voting */,
  "early_voting_end" TEXT /* End date for early voting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the county belongs to */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county for demographic analysis */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles or square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "towns" (
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each town */,
  "town_name" TEXT /* Name of the town */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the town is located in */,
  "town_population" INTEGER /* Population of the town for demographic analysis */,
  "town_area" REAL /* Area of the town in square miles or square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("town_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_towns_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_number" INTEGER /* Number of the precinct */,
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the town the precinct belongs to */,
  "precinct_population" INTEGER /* Population of the precinct for demographic analysis */,
  "precinct_area" REAL /* Area of the precinct in square miles or square kilometers */,
  "voter_registration_count" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("town_id") REFERENCES towns ("town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office (e.g., President, Senator) */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election the office is contested in */,
  "office_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the office */,
  "office_term_length" INTEGER /* Length of the term for the office in years */,
  "office_term_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of terms a person can serve in the office */,
  "office_eligibility_requirements" TEXT /* Eligibility requirements for the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Name of the party leader */,
  "party_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date when the party was founded */,
  "party_headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the party headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office they are contesting */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate represents */,
  "candidate_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the candidate */,
  "candidate_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the candidate */,
  "candidate_education" TEXT /* Educational background of the candidate */,
  "candidate_profession" TEXT /* Professional background of the candidate */,
  "candidate_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's official website */,
  "candidate_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the candidate */,
  "candidate_campaign_funds" REAL /* Total campaign funds raised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate receiving the votes */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the votes were cast */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate in the precinct */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., In-person, Mail-in, Early voting) */,
  "vote_time" TEXT /* Time when the vote was cast */,
  "ballot_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the ballot used to cast the vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., election official, analyst) */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing permissions for the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
